title: Warrior's Longing
content:
I would like to lie in my bed
    In a white shirt,
    Wished the beard was gone,
    The head combed.
    The fingers were clean,
    The nails also,
    You, my tender woman,
    Might provide peace.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Alfred Lichtenstein, titled "Warrior's Longing", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
